I'm disgusted. How out of touch do you have to be to applaud a bill that will kick 13 million Americans off their health insurance and force millions more to pay higher rates and higher taxes?

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Worst. Resolution. Ever. (cutting Medicare and Social Security)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, We have it from both sides of the Capitol. Speaker Paul Ryan and Florida's very own Senator Marco Rubio have both admitted that the GOP will try to cut Medicare and Social Security in the New Year. To them, this is the fulfillment of years of work. To me, it's the worst New Year's resolution ever. **And to seniors and their families all across Florida, this is something that could ruin their financial stability.** I'm fighting to protect seniors. I need to know that you are fighting beside me. [_**We have a big FEC goal this month -- $20,000 by the 31st. Will you help us reach it?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e51/622b7b5b/184b8caf/307ba3e9/2299911060/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171220z?refcode=dwse171220z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") It's not like this is a surprise. Republicans have attacked Medicare and Social Security for a long time. And with Trump in the White House, they might just get what they want. I can promise you this -- **as long as Republicans come after Medicare and Social Security, I will stand in their way.** That position doesn't make me very popular with President Trump or his Administration. But that doesn't matter to me. As long as seniors in Florida and around the country can keep their Medicare and Social Security, they can attack me all they like. I need you on my side and we need to continue to grow our team, today. The FEC quarter ends on the 31st, and we need to get to our $20,000 goal. [_**Stand with me by rushing in $5 or more.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e51/622b7b5b/184b8caf/307ba3e9/2299911060/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse171220z?refcode=dwse171220z_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie |

name: The White House
subject: Want to know more?
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=145b3592b84f20bf1c3537093a91785a40b0147967971cf714779fc2a0696f5355c533cdf5afc8799dc19cf1243b93a607a4c092bcc861f5

Want to know more about tax cuts? Here are the facts.

With news yesterday that Congress passed the first overhaul of the U.S. tax system in more than three decades, many Americans want to know what the final bill means for them.

Here are the key provisions to understand and share with your loved ones:

1. The Tax Cuts Act means less money taken out of Americans’ paychecks. It provides $5.5 trillion in tax cuts by doubling the standard deduction, doubling the child tax credit, protecting tax savings for higher education and retirement, and lowering rates across the board.

2. The bill puts American businesses on a level playing field with foreign competitors. America’s corporate tax rate will go from being the highest in the developed world to below the average for Organization of Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) countries.

3. The act will eliminate dozens of special interest tax breaks and loopholes. It tosses out a loophole used to deduct compensation for executives earning more than $1 million a year. Washington isn’t spared, either: Members of Congress will no longer be able to deduct living expenses.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ffab358eb7fe7324a62fbbe93e3594045bc14ddc55587d519616a27ad6c19293b65b5fcd3227eff64525c852154583be204600371adb6cdf
Read more about what tax cuts have to do with making America great.

‘We broke every record’

President Donald J. Trump joined members of Congress for a ceremony on the White House South Lawn yesterday after the Tax Cuts Act passed both chambers on Capitol Hill.
“We broke every record,” President Trump said. “$3.2 trillion—just think of it—in tax cuts for American families.”

Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell cited tax cuts as just the latest victory in “a year of extraordinary accomplishment for the Trump Administration.” His list included cementing “the Supreme Court right-of-center for a generation” and halting the overregulation of the U.S. economy.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ffab358eb7fe7324e43cf6e543073451833cbabb471782e050ca3819f20496cc1d2cc15b7e857a8df8f89d817a70594be86dae6fb0cab78e
Watch yesterday’s ceremony on the White House South Lawn.

The final Cabinet meeting of 2017

At his ninth and final Cabinet meeting of 2017, President Trump and members of the Cabinet showcased record achievements over the past year. A few of the highlights:

- Defense Secretary Jim Mattis gave the President high marks for his National Security Strategy, which puts the safety and security of America first.
- Attorney General Jeff Sessions reported on efforts to combat the opioid crisis, ending sanctuary jurisdiction policies, and prioritizing criminal immigration enforcement.
- Interior Secretary Ryan Zinke announced that the United States has opened 150,000 acres of public land to hunting and fishing.
- Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross highlighted the more than $650 billion in deals signed during the President’s trips to Saudi Arabia and China.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ffab358eb7fe73243687e6f830d300d0f06fc898fa4bef9e6ed6815918aae6df0c6dc4faced3581280bac5f9a7e67f4a8f80fcc5a4bdacad
Read the full list of accomplishments by department.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump celebrates the passage of the Tax Cuts Act with Vice President Mike Pence, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, and Speaker of the House Paul Ryan | December 20, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ffab358eb7fe732400881551ef5dd2e5f28dd345ea88976aa48ccfb6467f727d989a5274e87d9514cff27be6bf55411427fea0081ca445ed
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=ffab358eb7fe73246337251bcceaa10029a7a537ad033d1ad559fa34b16201f08d1f4a0b5186bcd406908b89250a6bd25ca84733d442d5f9
Contact the White House |

name: Mike Pence
subject: Have you signed the First Family’s Christmas card yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I know they’re going to truly appreciate this gesture. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=095ad160e29640e5f9c2f2e9364191254661921a5d7e559920a58cf8585e56a449e33d0cf7107aae26a6173036545184e4c499f7df5d73ce)
---

Friend,

The Christmas season is a time of prayer, reflection, and cheer for my family, as well as families across America.

I am so thankful for and incredibly humbled by all of God's blessings in my life -- especially during this historic year -- and _you_ have played such an important part in all of our remarkable achievements.

There's an Official First Family Christmas Card going around for some of our top supporters, Friend, and I wanted to be sure you knew how much it would mean to the President and the First Family to see your name and read your Christmas message.
[SIGN THE CARD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=095ad160e29640e5bda7afb84514af169e140192f81ca7ee76a9cbdfd60fada90c40dde9e21abc938cbf99d0eb6373255117c88097710797)
Karen and I always celebrate the season with our family and close friends, and I know the President and the First Lady do the same.

So let's make President Trump's first Christmas in the Oval Office unforgettable.

**[Please, take a moment to sign the Official First Family Christmas Card and share your personal message with the President and his family before December 23.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=095ad160e29640e5bac2bbef5fc0e85544c2b0b757be49306aedc59f2bcf754f9fc5570134c8685e075d4976f1410b390bef8e60b971925c)**

Thank you, God bless, and Merry Christmas,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=095ad160e29640e5666678bd965f8f9c8cfb5c98dc39500e99a917332884796820554ab46f8d9d6f7df346e04e5ad50cb43ef2a0e6baf22e)
Mike Pence
Vice President of the United States

**P.S. Yes, we are saying "Merry Christmas" again. Please make sure to sign the card before we give it to the First Family:** **[https://action.donaldjtrump.com/official-first-family-christmas-card/](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=095ad160e29640e5796ec91054bbd58a2a9bb6cb3e91fa4128b4b148e79f5e7832e1e9d21b860504623b6e540cd2c7e4500cde8d7661a682)**

body:
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Statement on Governor Sununu Stopping a Toll Increase**
**For Immediate Release:** 12/21/2017
**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, (202) 321-5310
CONCORD - NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement on Governor Sununu's leadership in stopping the toll increase:
“As New Hampshire families gather through the Christmas season, they can celebrate the defeat of a massive toll increase. Thanks to the leadership of Governor Chris Sununu, the proposed toll increase will be removed from the agenda in a preemptive veto. Today marks a victory for all Granite Staters. New Hampshire voters ought to remember that Chris Pappas, the Democrat establishment pick for Congress, supported this toll increase all along and will have to defend this position to the voters of Congressional District 01.”
###

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name: Congress must fund CHIP
body:
Funding is about to expire for the Children's Health Insurance Program. Tell Congress to fund CHIP now.
---
**Add your name to demand Republicans in Congress reauthorize CHIP funding immediately:
**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/tell-congress-fund-CHIP-now?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20171221_dnc_nd&source=em_20171221_dnc_nd")****
_Nine million._ That's the number of children across the country who depend on CHIP -- the Children's Health Insurance Program -- to receive health coverage.

It's an enormously popular program -- but its funding expired on September 30. Republicans in Congress thought it was more important to focus on giving tax breaks to corporations and the 1% than ensuring millions of children can continue to have health care.

Here's the worst part: If Republicans refuse to fund the program, nearly two million kids could lose health insurance in January.

**[Add your name right now to tell Republicans in Congress to stop playing politics with children's health care. It's time to pass funding for CHIP immediately.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/tell-congress-fund-CHIP-now?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+right+now+to+tell+Republic&utm_campaign=em_20171221_dnc_nd&source=em_20171221_dnc_nd")**

When kids aren't covered by health insurance, parents are often forced to delay or even skip the medical care their children need. For children with serious illnesses or chronic conditions, there can be grave consequences for neglecting care.

Since it was passed 20 years ago, CHIP has had bipartisan support. But we don't have to tell you that today's GOP is forever stooping to a new low.

This is what we're up against, Derek: A Republican-controlled Congress that would rather give massive tax breaks to corporations and the wealthy than provide health insurance for the kids who need it most.

**[Time is running out: Join us right now to demand that Republicans in Congress reauthorize CHIP funding before tomorrow's deadline.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/tell-congress-fund-CHIP-now?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Time+is+running+out+Join+us+right+now+to&utm_campaign=em_20171221_dnc_nd&source=em_20171221_dnc_nd")**

Thanks for making your voice heard.

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d1e/4067b0a/4fa3c7ca7/7e5d8318/953729319/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171221_dnc_nd&source=em_20171221_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm in this fight all the way, but I can't do it without you
disclaimer_text: paid for by millions of working families
body:
In a vote on the Senate floor in the dead of night, the Republicans delivered a giant, gift-wrapped present to big banks like Wells Fargo, giant corporations, and billionaires, paid for by millions of working families.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171221-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

Corrupt. That's a pretty tough word. Tough, but how else does anyone explain what the Republicans just did.

In a vote on the Senate floor in the dead of night, the Republicans delivered a giant, gift-wrapped present to big banks like Wells Fargo, giant corporations, and billionaires. And who will pay for this present? Millions of working families.

Most Americans see this bill for what it is: A giveaway to the rich and powerful. But Republicans in Congress didn't care what working Americans thought. They proved that they're not here to work for the people. They're here to work for the donors who fund their campaigns and Super PACs.

It's bad enough that the Republicans are handing over billions in giveaways to the rich, but the American people will be paying for generations to come.

We've been fighting our hearts out all year to resist and persist -- and our work has been powerfully important. But here's the harsh reality: When Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House, billionaire megadonors who fund the Paul Ryans and Mitch McConnells of the world will call the shots. That means a tax bill that is a payoff to those donors can breeze through Congress and rig the system even more for the rich and powerful.

So what's next? The answer: We fight back. We fight back and we take back control. We're eleven months away from Election Day -- our biggest opportunity to stop the GOP agenda dead in its tracks. I'm in this fight all the way, but I can't do it alone.

[**Help us send a message to the GOP: We 're going to remind America that Republicans sold out the American people -- remind them today, tomorrow and every day until Election Day. Chip in $1 to elect Senate Democrats and replace the GOP in 2018.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171221-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

We're angry. We're frustrated. We're disgusted. But we will NOT lose hope. The best way to stop Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan and turn this country around is to fight back. And that is exactly what we will do.

We might not have billionaire megadonors in our back pocket -- but we don't need them. We have you -- and if we stand together, today and every day, we will fight, and we will win.

**Don 't stop fighting now. Chip in $1 to elect Senate Democrats, stop the Republican agenda in 2018 and help level the playing field for working families:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/fight-back-now**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171221-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: Big strides, as early as next year
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

LegitAction members have an opportunity next year to bring
groundbreaking progress to our democracy -- including transforming our
presidential elections.

We’re going to keep pushing for Connecticut, Oregon, and other states
to join the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact so votes in every
state matter. We’re going to push for automatic voter registration in
Massachusetts and around the country so more people cast ballots. And
we’re going to keep pushing to restore the ability to vote to folks
with convictions in Florida and California.

These are things we can and will get done to meaningfully improve
legitimacy, even with President Trump in the White House and his
enablers controlling Congress.

But in order to make our next election more legitimate than our last
one, we have to start 2018 with the resources to push hard. So I’m
asking you and your fellow supporters to contribute an additional
$15,000 before 2017 ends on December 31.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/3463?t=1002&akid=479%2E356062%2E-fCgtI ]Help LegitAction raise an additional $15,000 before December ends
so we can start 2018 pushing hard for more legitimate elections. Make
a contribution of $3 now.

In the battle for our democratic legitimacy, LegitAction members are
committed to holding our ground against right-wing threats while
pushing to advance progressive reforms.

We will keep making it clear just how illegitimate the sham
Trump-Pence election commission is. We will keep fighting against
hyperpartisan gerrymandering. But we can also help pass automatic
voter registration bills, re-enfranchise felons, and move closer to a
true national popular vote.

And if we do all that, we’ll end up with an election that’s far more
legitimate than we could have imagined just a year ago.

Our plans for next year are big, but our capacity for making a
difference is even bigger. Let’s hit the ground running in January by
meeting our goal of raising $15,000 more before the year ends.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/3463?t=1003&akid=479%2E356062%2E-fCgtI ]Help LegitAction hit the ground running in 2018. Make a
contribution of $3 now to
help reach our goal of raising another $15,000 in grassroots
contributions before 2017 ends.

Legit members have the ability to make big strides for legitimacy in
our presidential elections as early as next year. But we have to
prepare now.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Your chance to go to Ralph's inaugural ball:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

This fall, I asked you to join me in supporting my friend Ralph Northam in his race for Governor. You did -- and together, we helped elect another strong Democrat to succeed Terry McAuliffe and continue Virginia's progress.

Thank you so much. I've asked a lot of you this past year -- from adding your name to petitions to volunteering in person to giving whatever you can afford to not only my own campaign, but those of other Democrats, too. And when it really matters, you always step up. I'm so grateful for that.

As a special thank you for all of your continued support, my team is giving away two tickets to Ralph's official inaugural ball in January. We'll make all the arrangements for one winner and their guest to go to the ball and celebrate Ralph and Virginia Democrats.

**When you pitch in $10 or whatever you can by midnight on Christmas Eve, you'll be automatically entered to win. How about it? Enter now by clicking this link:

[https://www.timkaine.com/win-inaugural-ball-tickets](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BUDV3p0%2Fa14tfoAF64yGCZcW7TCIPFYb)**

Good luck!

Tim

---

| | | Friend,

We're now less than 2 weeks away from the New Year, the year we send Corey Stewart to the U.S. Senate to replace Hillary's stooge, Tim Kaine.

In order to win in the fall, we must first get Corey's name on the ballot this winter. [Will you sign up to help Team Corey collect signatures?](https://coreystewart.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4bda7ecfd918a7c6eeeede5d2&id=076443676a&e=b8a7e4c8d6)

Getting on the ballot in Virginia is no easy task. Each campaign must collect thousands of signatures in every part of the state.

That is why on Saturday, January 6th, we will be hosting volunteers in locations around Virginia to collect signatures. [Will you join us?](https://coreystewart.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4bda7ecfd918a7c6eeeede5d2&id=39343dea96&e=b8a7e4c8d6)
[Stewart for Senate Signature Saturday!](https://coreystewart.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4bda7ecfd918a7c6eeeede5d2&id=c1bdcb30e6&e=b8a7e4c8d6)
January 6th, 2018
10 AM - 5 PM
RSVP by clicking [here](https://coreystewart.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4bda7ecfd918a7c6eeeede5d2&id=6fc1335348&e=b8a7e4c8d6)
After you [RSVP](https://coreystewart.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4bda7ecfd918a7c6eeeede5d2&id=e0b76913c8&e=b8a7e4c8d6), a member of our team will contact you to get you started. If you would like to start earlier or can help another day, please sign up at coreystewart.com/take_action or email us here at info@coreystewart.com.

The Virginia Dept. of Elections won't allow campaigns to start collecting Ballot Petition Signatures until January 1. We can't waste any time!

[Will you join #TeamCorey staff and volunteers at one of the many locations in Virginia?](https://coreystewart.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4bda7ecfd918a7c6eeeede5d2&id=6854750c19&e=b8a7e4c8d6)
